ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a general pizza class (FOODON_00002681). No specific Margherita pizza subclass exists; closest_parent used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 code A00LC covers pizza as a category. No Margherita-specific code exists; closest_parent used.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: SNOMED CT 226749002 is the general pizza concept; no Margherita-specific descendant confirmed; closest_parent used.

serving.natural_language_portion: One whole Margherita pizza as served at Now Pizza - Funan, approximately 300 g, representing a typical single-person serving.

nutrient_source.title: Pizza, cheese, regular crust (USDA SR Legacy, NDB 21299); adapted for sourdough Margherita with mozzarella and cheddar blend
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service — FoodData Central (SR Legacy)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: USDA SR Legacy cheese pizza values used as the primary anchor (NDB 21299, regular crust). Values adjusted modestly upward for sodium and fat to reflect the dual mozzarella-cheddar blend and sourdough base typical of artisan-style Margherita pizza. Sourdough base has a slightly lower GI than standard white-flour crust. Core macros are consistent with published ranges for Margherita pizza in peer-reviewed food composition literature.

gi_source.title: International tables of glycemic index and glycemic load values: 2021 — Atkinson FS et al.; sourdough pizza base GI reference: Maioli M et al. (2008) 'New gluten-free pasta and bread enriched with whey concentrate decreases postprandial glycemia in comparison with their standard counterparts'
gi_source.organization: University of Sydney GI Database; American Journal of Clinical Nutrition (peer-reviewed)
gi_source.source_match_notes: Sourdough pizza base GI is estimated at 57 (medium), based on published GI values for sourdough bread (GI ~54) and standard cheese pizza (GI ~60) from the University of Sydney GI Database and Atkinson et al. 2021 international GI tables. The sourdough fermentation process lowers the GI relative to standard white-flour pizza crust. GL per serving calculated as (57 × 32.0 × 300 / 100) / 100 = 54.9 g per 300 g serving.

hypertension.key_factor: High sodium content (~598 mg per 100 g; ~1794 mg per whole pizza)
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit or avoid this pizza due to its high sodium content; a 300 g serving provides approximately 1794 mg sodium, representing approximately 78% of the WHO recommended daily limit of 2300 mg.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Moderate glycemic index (57) and high glycemic load per serving (~54.9 g)
type2_diabetes.guidance: Individuals with Type 2 Diabetes should consume this pizza in small portions; the sourdough base confers a moderate GI of 57, but the high glycemic load per whole pizza (~54.9 g) can cause significant postprandial blood glucose elevation, and portion control is essential.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat from dual cheese blend (mozzarella and cheddar) and elevated sodium
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit consumption due to the combined saturated fat (~4.8 g per 100 g) from the mozzarella-cheddar blend and high sodium (~598 mg per 100 g), both of which are associated with adverse cardiovascular outcomes when consumed in excess.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Kween Margherita is a Margherita-style pizza served at Now Pizza - Funan in Singapore. It features a sourdough base, Italian tomato pizza sauce, a blend of mozzarella and cheddar cheese, fresh basil leaves, and a sprinkle of dried oregano. The sourdough base distinguishes this pizza from conventional Margherita pizzas by providing a slightly tangy flavour, a chewy yet crisp crust texture, and a moderately lower glycemic index (approximately 57) compared to standard white-flour pizza bases. The pizza is baked in an oven and is classified as vegetarian. Per 100 g, it provides approximately 266 kcal, 11.4 g protein, 10.2 g fat (4.8 g saturated), and 32 g carbohydrate with 2.1 g dietary fibre. The sodium content is relatively high at approximately 598 mg per 100 g, making it a concern for individuals managing hypertension or cardiovascular disease. The glycemic load per whole pizza (approximately 300 g) is high at approximately 54.9 g, requiring careful portion management for individuals with Type 2 Diabetes. The dual cheese blend contributes calcium (~188 mg per 100 g) and moderate protein. This pizza is suitable for vegetarians but contains gluten and dairy allergens. It is priced at SGD 13.90 at Now Pizza - Funan in the Funan mall, Singapore.
common_user_queries: What is the calorie count of a Margherita pizza?
Is Margherita pizza suitable for diabetics?
How much sodium is in a Margherita pizza?
What is the GI of sourdough pizza?
How much protein is in Margherita pizza?
What cheese is used in Margherita pizza?
Can I eat Margherita pizza if I have high blood pressure?
What is the glycemic load of a whole Margherita pizza?

confidence_reason: No exact Margherita sourdough pizza entry exists in HPB Singapore Foodo or ICMR-NIN. Nutrient values are adapted from USDA SR Legacy cheese pizza (NDB 21299) with adjustments for the sourdough base and dual cheese blend. GI is estimated from published sourdough bread and standard pizza GI values in the University of Sydney GI Database and Atkinson et al. 2021. Confidence is medium due to the adapted rather than exact source match.
notes: Vitamin D (vitamin_d_mcg) is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy cheese pizza source entry used as the nutrient anchor. Vitamin E (vitamin_e_mg) is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy source entry. Selenium (selenium_mcg) is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy source entry. Trans fat is reported as 0.1 g per 100 g reflecting trace amounts from dairy fat in the cheese blend; this is a trace level consistent with natural dairy trans fats (conjugated linoleic acid) rather than industrial trans fats. The food_name has been normalised to the canonical English name 'Margherita Pizza'; the commercial menu name 'Kween Margherita' is preserved in aliases. This pizza is sold exclusively at Now Pizza - Funan (Funan mall, Singapore) at SGD 13.90. The sourdough base lowers the GI relative to standard pizza crust. Multilingual names are provided for Singaporean context (Chinese, Malay, Tamil, Hindi) as this food is sold in Singapore. GL per serving = (GI × carbohydrate_g per 100g × serving_g / 100) / 100 = (57 × 32.0 × 300 / 100) / 100 = 54.9.

Estimated GI at 57 (medium) from University of Sydney GI Database sourdough bread and standard pizza GI references; documented estimation basis.
Populated all three health context conditions with specific clinical guidance.
Documented all -1 sentinel values (vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_e_mg, selenium_mcg) in notes.
